## Results Summary
**Status: FAILED** - Exit code 2
### Passing checks: - **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1678 files already formatted - **Markdown Check**: PASSED - **Exec Reference Check**: OK (reference.md is up to date) - **ty**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5838 passed in 12.96s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed in 4.84s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed in 0.85s - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: 24 passed
